summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Samson Church Management System. Backend APIs are fully functional (36/36 tests passed). Frontend loads successfully with working navigation, member management, groups, giving dashboard, and all core features. Minor timing issues detected on dashboard loading that don't affect core functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Occasional loading skeleton states persist after navigation back to dashboard
ui_bugs.workaround: Refresh page or wait for data to load

passed_tests: Dashboard stats endpoint with correct data (201 members, 20 groups, $84,250 MTD giving)
People list with pagination (25 people per page)
Person detail pages with tabs (Overview, Giving, Attendance, Groups)
Person CRUD operations (create and update tested)
Group detail pages and member lists
Reports endpoints (giving by fund, method, top donors, membership)
Responsive sidebar with proper icons and labels
Data integration between backend and frontend
